Travel Details:
Akasa Air BLR 09:20 -> HKT 15:05 (approx 4h 15m)
BOOKED via Akasa Air
Reach BLR airport by 07:00 (2 hrs before intl)
Carry THB 15,000 cash or withdraw at HKT arrival ATM
Airport taxi to Patong ~600 THB, 45 min (book via hotel for fixed price)
Summary of day's events: Arrive Phuket ~15:05. Immigration + baggage (~1 hr). Taxi to Patong. Check in, freshen up. Evening: beach walk, dinner on Bangla Rd — or quieter Kata/Karon if preferred.
Address: Patong or Kata Beach, Phuket, Thailand

Travel Details:
Tour van pickup from hotel 07:30
Speedboat from Rassada or Chalong pier
Return 18:00
Summary of day's events: Phi Phi Islands full-day speedboat tour — Maya Bay, Pileh Lagoon, Viking Cave, Bamboo Island, Monkey Beach, snorkel stops.
Address: Patong or Kata Beach, Phuket, Thailand

Travel Details:
Half-day private driver ~1,500 THB OR rent scooter ~300 THB
Grab also works
Summary of day's events: Big Buddha (morning) → Phuket Old Town (lunch + walking) → Promthep Cape (sunset). Dress code at Big Buddha (shoulders + knees). Old Town Sunday Walking Street closed today (Wed). Promthep arrive 45 min before sunset.
Address: Patong or Kata Beach, Phuket, Thailand

Travel Details:
Private van Phuket -> Ao Nang hotel, 2.5 hrs, ~1,800 THB total
Depart Phuket 09:00 -> arrive Ao Nang 12:00
Book van 1 day in advance via hotel or 12go.asia
Summary of day's events: Morning transfer to Krabi. Afternoon at Ao Nang beach, evening fire shows on the beach + seafood dinner.

Travel Details:
Tour boat from Ao Nang pier
Longtail cheaper, speedboat faster
~1,200 THB/person for longtail
Labour Day holiday in Thailand — expect crowds
Summary of day's events: Krabi 4-Islands tour by longtail or speedboat — Phra Nang Cave, Poda, Chicken Island, Tup Island sandbar, Railay finish.

Travel Details:
Lomprayah or Phantip combo ticket from Ao Nang
Pickup 06:30 -> minivan 3.5 hrs -> Donsak pier -> catamaran 1.5 hrs -> Nathon pier -> taxi 30 min
Arrive Samui hotel ~14:30
Book combo ticket on 12go.asia 3-4 days out (~1,200 THB/person, includes hotel pickup)
Take Dramamine if prone to seasickness
Summary of day's events: Krabi -> Koh Samui full travel day via bus + ferry combo. Arrive Samui afternoon, settle in at Bophut, sunset + dinner at Fisherman's Village (18:00).
Address: Bophut or Chaweng Beach, Koh Samui, Thailand

Travel Details:
Tour pickup from hotel 07:30
Speedboat from Bophut or Maenam pier
Return 17:30
~2,500 THB/person
Book 2-3 days out
Weather-dependent — check forecast night before
Summary of day's events: Ang Thong National Marine Park full-day speedboat tour — 42 islands, emerald lagoon, viewpoint hike, kayaking in hidden lagoon. THE headline Samui day.
Address: Bophut or Chaweng Beach, Koh Samui, Thailand

Travel Details:
Rent scooter 300 THB/day OR hire driver half-day ~1,500 THB
Samui roads are easy, traffic light
Summary of day's events: Samui island loop: Wat Phra Yai (Big Buddha) -> Hin Ta / Hin Yai rocks -> Na Muang Waterfall -> afternoon at Chaweng Beach -> dinner at Chaweng or Bophut. Skip elephant rides at Na Muang (ethics).
Address: Bophut or Chaweng Beach, Koh Samui, Thailand

Travel Details:
Taxi Samui hotel -> Lipa Noi pier (30 min, ~500 THB)
Raja Ferry 08:00 Lipa Noi -> Donsak (1.5 hrs, ~200 THB)
Shuttle bus Donsak -> Surat Thani Airport URT (1.5 hrs, ~300 THB)
AirAsia URT 15:35 -> DMK 16:50 (1h 15min)
DMK -> hotel: airport bus A1 to BTS Mo Chit 50 THB, or taxi ~400 THB (45-60 min)
ACTION REQUIRED: REBOOK AirAsia FD flight from WED 6 MAY to TUE 5 MAY via airasia.com -> Manage Booking. Change fee ~700-1,200 THB + fare difference
Pre-book ferry+bus combo on 12go.asia
Summary of day's events: Samui -> Surat Thani -> fly to Bangkok (DMK). Check in at Bangkok hotel, dinner near hotel. Keep evening light.

Travel Details:
Grab or MRT to Grand Palace
Walk between Grand Palace and Wat Pho
Chao Phraya ferry to Wat Arun (5 THB one-way)
Summary of day's events: Temple triple crown: Grand Palace (08:30 sharp) -> Wat Pho Reclining Buddha (+ optional Thai massage 320 THB/30 min) -> cross river by ferry to Wat Arun. Evening: rooftop bar (Sky Bar / Vertigo) or Khao San Road. Grand Palace dress code STRICT: long pants/skirt, covered shoulders, closed shoes. Tickets 500 THB.

Travel Details:
Hired private car RT ~2,500 THB (book via hotel day before)
OR train from Krungthep Aphiwat Central ~20 THB each way (2 hrs)
Depart 07:30 -> back in Bangkok 17:30
Dinner cruise 20:00
Summary of day's events: Ayutthaya day trip — ancient Siamese capital. Wat Mahathat (Buddha head in tree roots), Wat Phra Si Sanphet, Wat Chaiwatthanaram. Guide at Wat Mahathat ~300 THB. Evening: Chao Phraya dinner cruise (Wonderful Pearl / Princess) ~1,500 THB incl. buffet — book on Klook.

Travel Details:
River cruise: Sathorn pier
MBK: BTS National Stadium
Chatuchak: BTS Mo Chit or MRT Chatuchak Park
Asiatique: free shuttle boat from Sathorn pier
Summary of day's events: SHOPPING DAY. Morning: Chao Phraya river cruise to ICONSIAM (shopping + lunch). Afternoon: MBK Center or Terminal 21. Evening 17:00-22:00: CHATUCHAK (Friday evening opens, plant/wholesale + many regular vendors, less chaotic than weekend). Alternative: Asiatique Riverfront (daily 16:00-midnight). ONLY shopping day — return flight Sat 08:05 rules out Chatuchak weekend. PACK BAGS TONIGHT. Back at hotel by 22:00 — 04:00 wake tomorrow.

Travel Details:
IndiGo BKK 08:05 -> BLR 10:15 BOOKED
INTERNATIONAL CHECK-IN CLOSES 60 MIN BEFORE = 07:05 CUTOFF
Reach airport by 05:30 absolute latest
IndiGo usually operates from BKK Suvarnabhumi — verify on e-ticket
04:00 wake -> 04:30 taxi -> 05:30 BKK
Grab or pre-booked taxi hotel -> Suvarnabhumi, 45-60 min at this hour, ~400 THB
Airport Rail Link doesn't start until 05:30 — taxi only reliable option
Book Grab scheduled night before, or ask hotel for 04:30 taxi
Carry passport + boarding pass printout
Keep ₹500 for airport taxi at BLR arrival
Summary of day's events: Very early departure. No sightseeing — just get to airport.
